redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: Canonical product fields persist and re-poll updates the same Product row by tiktok_product_id.

failed: product payload routed through order id heuristic, leaving zero Product rows

redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: Order ETL persists order_value, timing fields, cancel_reason, is_seller_fault, and keeps total_amount populated for legacy API compatibility.

commands.outputSummary: failed: Order object has no attribute order_value

redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: Return edge test failed because a returned SKU different from the parent OrderItem SKU stayed return_type=other.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: ETL now derives item_swap from persisted OrderItem edges when the return SKU differs from ordered SKU.

redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: N/A - refactor and regression pass after green cycles.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: Relevant ETL, polling, Fujiwa orchestration, and TikTok mapping suites pass; changed files pass ruff and IDE diagnostics.
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactorEvidence: Kept legacy API fields alongside canonical fields, normalized ETL timestamps centrally, and kept Fujiwa read-only orchestration unchanged.

implementationSummary: Issue #299: normalized polled TikTok product and order payloads into canonical persistence fields with idempotent natural-key upserts, fixed product-channel dispatch and ETL timestamp normalization for re-polls, and derived item_swap return_type from persisted OrderItem edges. Fujiwa read-only polling remains the upstream handoff boundary.
assumptions: The existing commerce tables remain backward-compatible for API routes, so canonical order_value is added alongside legacy total_amount.
Product canonical fields are nullable for existing rows and are populated by new ETL payloads.
Shop canonical metadata is provisioned by OAuth/Fujiwa credential flow; this slice normalizes polled Product, Order, OrderItem, and Return payloads.
risks: Migration 010 must run after 009 before canonical product/order fields are available in Postgres.
Order status canonicalization maps TikTok operational statuses to the documented canonical enum; downstream code that filters raw TikTok statuses should use the canonical values for ETL-created rows.
Return item_swap derivation depends on parent OrderItem being ingested before Return; missing order item edges conservatively leave return_type unchanged.
